title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXLV. Charms.
content:
My father he left me, just as he was able,
        One bowl, one bottle, one lable,
        Two bowls, two bottles, two lables,
        Three, & c. [And so on ad. lib. in one breath.]
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCXLV. Charms." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
